question: What is your refund policy?
expected_answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Items must be in original condition with proof of purchase. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.
context: The company offers a 30-day return window. Products must be unused and in original packaging. Refunds go back to the original payment method and take 5-7 business days to process.

question: How do I reset my password?
expected_answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your registered email address, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox. The link expires after 24 hours.
context: Password reset is available via the login page. Users click Forgot Password, enter their email, and receive a reset link valid for 24 hours.

question: What are your API rate limits?
expected_answer: Rate limits vary by plan: Free tier gets 100 requests/minute, Pro gets 1,000 requests/minute, and Enterprise has configurable limits. Rate limit headers are included in all API responses.
context: API rate limits: Free=100 req/min, Pro=1000 req/min, Enterprise=custom. All responses include X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.

question: Do you support SSO?
expected_answer: Yes, we support SAML 2.0 SSO with Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace. SSO is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Configuration is done through Settings > Authentication.
context: SSO support includes SAML 2.0 integration with Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace. Available on Pro and Enterprise tiers. Configured under Settings > Authentication > SSO.

question: Can I export my data?
expected_answer: Yes, you can export data in CSV, JSON, or Parquet format from Settings > Data > Export. Large exports are processed asynchronously with email notification upon completion.
context: Data export supports CSV, JSON, and Parquet formats. Access via Settings > Data > Export. Exports over 1GB are queued and users receive email when complete.

question: What is your uptime SLA?
expected_answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for Pro plans and 99.99% for Enterprise plans. SLA credits are automatically applied if we fall below the guaranteed uptime in any calendar month.
context: SLA guarantees: Pro=99.9% uptime, Enterprise=99.99% uptime. SLA credits are auto-applied for any month where uptime falls below the guarantee.

question: How do I invite team members?
expected_answer: Navigate to Settings > Team > Invite Members. Enter email addresses and assign roles (Admin, Editor, or Viewer). Invitees receive an email with a link to join your workspace.
context: Team invitations are managed under Settings > Team > Invite Members. Available roles: Admin (full access), Editor (read/write), Viewer (read-only). Invitations are sent via email.

question: What encryption do you use?
expected_answer: All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Enterprise customers can use their own encryption keys (BYOK) via AWS KMS or Google Cloud KMS.
context: Encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. BYOK support for Enterprise customers through AWS KMS or Google Cloud KMS integration.

question: How does billing work for overages?
expected_answer: Overages are billed at the end of each billing cycle at your plan's per-unit rate. You can set spending caps in Settings > Billing > Limits to prevent unexpected charges.
context: Overage billing occurs at end of billing cycle. Per-unit overage rates match the plan rate. Spending caps can be configured under Settings > Billing > Limits.

question: Do you have a status page?
expected_answer: Yes, our system status is available at status.example.com. You can subscribe to updates via email, SMS, or RSS. We also post incident reports within 24 hours of resolution.
context: System status page: status.example.com. Subscription options: email, SMS, RSS. Post-incident reports published within 24 hours of resolution.
